src: censusdis is a Python package for discovering, loading and analyzing, U.S. Census demographic, economic, and geographic data and metadata. It is designed to be intuitive and Pythonic, giving users access to the full collection of data and maps the U.S. Census publishes via their APIs.
ja: censusdisは米国国勢調査の人口統計・経済・地理データとメタデータの探索・読み込み・分析を行うPythonパッケージ。Census APIで公開されているデータとマップへの完全アクセスを直感的かつPythonicに提供
